sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_hashes (id UInt32, hashValue UInt32) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO test_hashes VALUES (1, murmurHash3_32(array(1, 2, 3), 'test', 100)), (2, murmurHash3_32('sample', toDateTime('2020-01-01 00:00:00')));
UPDATE test_hashes SET hashValue = murmurHash3_32(array('update', 2.0), id) WHERE id = 2;
SELECT id, hashValue, toTypeName(hashValue) AS type FROM test_hashes WHERE hashValue = murmurHash3_32('test', 5);
